name: Estoque por Categoria
query:
SELECT 
    i.item_group AS "Grupo:Link/Item Group:150",
    i.item_name AS "Item:Data:200",
    i.`custom_estado_de_conservação` AS "Estado:Data:120",
    i.custom_origem AS "Origem:Data:100",
    i.custom_tamanho AS "Tamanho:Data:80",
    i.custom_cor_principal AS "Cor:Data:100",
    b.actual_qty AS "Qtd:Float:80",
    b.valuation_rate AS "Valor Unit:Currency:100",
    b.stock_value AS "Valor Total:Currency:120"
FROM `tabBin` b
INNER JOIN `tabItem` i ON b.item_code = i.name
WHERE b.actual_qty > 0
ORDER BY i.item_group, i.item_name
report_script:
def execute(filters=None):
    columns = [
        {"label": "Item", "fieldname": "item_name", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 200},
        {"label": "Qtd", "fieldname": "qty", "fieldtype": "Float", "width": 80}
    ]
    
    data = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT 
            i.item_name,
            b.actual_qty as qty
        FROM `tabBin` b
        INNER JOIN `tabItem` i ON b.item_code = i.name
        WHERE b.actual_qty > 0
        LIMIT 5
    """, as_dict=1)
    
    return columns, data
